title: Your morning
prompt: Describe what you usually do in the morning.
reference_text: I wake up at seven, eat breakfast, and take the bus to work.

title: After work
prompt: Say what you often do after work or school.
reference_text: After work, I cook dinner and watch a short show.

title: Weekend plans
prompt: Talk about one thing you like to do on weekends.
reference_text: On weekends, I like to meet friends at the park.
